# Password Reset

To reset a forgotten password, select "Forgot password" on the sign-in page
and enter the email address on file. A reset link is sent immediately and
expires after 24 hours. Signing in from a new device may also trigger a
one-time verification code sent by email.

[Source: account_security.md#password-reset]
